query: SELECT productId, productName, premiumPrice, basePrice, bonus1Enabled, bonus2Enabled FROM productSettings WHERE productName LIKE '%تاريخ%' OR productName LIKE '%باركود%' OR productId IN ('149','154') ORDER BY productId;
